project.title: Latinas’ resilience, contributions to the United States, and role in the Latino community
project.description: In this activity, we will explore key moments where Latinas led movements, shaped policy, and inspired change—from creating an all-female mariachi ensemble to fighting for equal pay. Additionally, these activities will highlight the resilience of Latinas over the past 30 years.
project.creator: AngelicaAmezcua
